# Fork-maintained security patches for rayward-external/new-api
#
# Upstream (QuantumNous/new-api) does not carry these changes.
# Upstream syncs overwrite the files below; daily-patch-verify re-applies them.
#
# Format: <file> | <grep_pattern_that_proves_patch_is_present> | <human_description>
#
# How the routine uses this:
#   For each line, grep for the pattern in the file.
#   PASS → patch is intact, nothing to do.
#   FAIL → patch was wiped; agent reads the file, understands the missing invariant
#           from the description, and applies the minimal targeted fix using Edit.
#   After fixing: commit, push fix branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge.
#
# Updating this file:
#   When you add a new security patch, append a line here.
#   When upstream accepts one of our patches, remove the line.

common/email.go           | Strip CRLF from receiver            | SMTP header injection: strip \r\n from receiver param before use in To: header
common/email.go           | TLSInsecureSkipVerify                | SMTP TLS: InsecureSkipVerify must read common.TLSInsecureSkipVerify (not hardcoded true/false)
common/rate-limit.go      | 1_000_000                           | Uncontrolled allocation: cap slice capacity to 1_000_000 to prevent OOM from misconfigured limits
controller/misc.go        | url.QueryEscape                     | Unsafe quoting: password reset link must URL-encode the email param and use html.EscapeString on the href

# CodeQL inline-suppression comments (documented false positives, audited 2026-06-08).
# Each line proves the // CodeQL[...] FP comment is still present in the file.
web/classic/src/components/table/model-deployments/modals/CreateDeploymentModal.jsx | crypto.getRandomValues | js/insecure-randomness FIX: generateRandomKey uses crypto.randomUUID/getRandomValues, never Math.random, for API key generation
common/email.go           | CodeQL\[go/email-injection\]         | go/email-injection FP: receiver CRLF stripped via strings.NewReplacer; CodeQL does not model the replacer as a barrier
controller/misc.go        | CodeQL\[go/unsafe-quoting\]          | go/unsafe-quoting FP: ServerAddress is operator config and link is html.EscapeString'd (quotes encoded) before href interpolation
common/rate-limit.go      | CodeQL\[go/uncontrolled-allocation-size\] | go/uncontrolled-allocation-size FP: capacity clamped to [0, 1_000_000] above; CodeQL does not propagate the clamp
controller/channel.go     | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]         | go/request-forgery FP: FetchModels baseURL is admin-supplied upstream channel endpoint (RootAuth); intended gateway function
controller/channel.go     | CodeQL\[go/allocation-size-overflow\] | go/allocation-size-overflow FP: map capacity hint bounded by in-memory slice lengths; cannot overflow int
controller/wechat.go      | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]         | go/request-forgery FP: WeChatServerAddress is operator config; user code is url.QueryEscape'd into query only
relay/channel/gemini/relay-gemini.go | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]  | go/request-forgery FP: baseURL is admin-supplied upstream channel endpoint (RootAuth); intended gateway function
relay/channel/ollama/relay-ollama.go | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]  | go/request-forgery FP: baseURL is admin-supplied upstream channel endpoint (RootAuth); intended gateway function
service/download.go       | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]         | go/request-forgery FP: workerUrl is operator config; user req.URL is SSRF-validated via ValidateURLWithFetchSetting
service/user_notify.go    | CodeQL\[go/request-forgery\]         | go/request-forgery FP: Bark finalURL is user's own endpoint, SSRF-validated via ValidateURLWithFetchSetting
relay/channel/task/jimeng/adaptor.go | CodeQL\[go/weak-sensitive-data-hashing\] | go/weak-sensitive-data-hashing FP: provider-mandated HMAC-SHA256 request signing (SigV4-style), not password storage
relay/common/override.go  | CodeQL\[go/allocation-size-overflow\] | go/allocation-size-overflow FP: slice capacity hint bounded by in-memory slice lengths; cannot overflow int
.github/codeql/codeql-config.yml | useUsageLogsData.jsx | js/clear-text-storage-of-sensitive-data FP: billingDisplayMode is 'price'/'ratio' UI toggle; paths-ignore (JS inline suppression unsupported by code scanning)
